acceptance_criteria:
- [ ] No `crate::daemon::query` imports in CLI
- [ ] No daemon `IpcError`/`OpResult` imports in CLI
- [ ] Command output behavior unchanged
description:
**Problem**
CLI uses daemon query/op/error types directly.
design: Move to `beads_surface::{Filters, SortField, OpResult, IpcError}` equivalents and keep typed behavior intact.
title: Migrate CLI query/op/error imports to beads-surface
